incidents.title: Thundering herd caused by retry amplification after queue consumer concurrency increase
incidents.root_cause: Consumer concurrency increased from 4 to 12 during partial downstream failure. Each consumer retried aggressively, amplifying load 3x on already-degraded payments-service. Cascaded to SEV-1.
incidents.resolution: Emergency rollback of concurrency config. Added circuit breaker and backpressure mechanism. Incident took 47 minutes to resolve.

incidents.title: Retry storm during peak traffic window caused SLA breach across order pipeline
incidents.root_cause: Config change deployed during peak window increased retry fanout under flash sale load. queue depth grew 6x in 8 minutes, p99 breached SLA.
incidents.resolution: Rolled back config, implemented queue depth-based backpressure. Added mandatory off-peak deployment policy for retry config changes.

incidents.title: Missing load test on concurrency change led to capacity exhaustion in staging spillover
incidents.root_cause: No load test performed for consumer concurrency increase. Under real production traffic, thread pool exhaustion caused cascading timeouts.
incidents.resolution: Rolled back. Load test gate added to deployment checklist for concurrency changes.
